name: EDUCATIONAL DEVELOPMENT CORP
summary: Educational Development Corporation (EDC) is a Delaware-incorporated publisher and distributor of children's educational products. It owns and publishes Kane Miller children's books, Learning Wrap-Ups educational manipulatives, and SmartLab Toys STEAM-based toys and games. EDC is also the exclusive U.S. MLM distributor of Usborne Publishing Limited children's books. Products are sold through two divisions: PaperPie (direct sales via ~7,800 Brand Partners) and EDC Publishing (trade sales to ~4,000 retail outlets).
